scenes.name: いすとつくえ
scenes.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 400 400"><rect width="400" height="400" fill="#FFFFFF"/><g id="floor"><line x1="20" y1="360" x2="380" y2="360" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="desk-top"><rect x="60" y="180" width="280" height="30" fill="#D4A373" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="desk-leg-left"><rect x="80" y="210" width="20" height="150" fill="#D4A373" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="desk-leg-right"><rect x="300" y="210" width="20" height="150" fill="#D4A373" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="desk-drawer"><rect x="180" y="215" width="100" height="35" fill="#FFE5B4" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/><circle cx="230" cy="232" r="4" fill="#333"/></g><g id="book"><rect x="120" y="160" width="50" height="20" fill="#90BFD9" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="pencil"><rect x="200" y="170" width="60" height="8" fill="#FFEB99" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/><polygon points="260,170 270,174 260,178" fill="#333" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="chair-seat"><rect x="60" y="260" width="90" height="20" fill="#FFB5A7" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="chair-back"><rect x="60" y="190" width="15" height="75" fill="#FFB5A7" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="chair-leg-front"><rect x="65" y="280" width="10" height="80" fill="#FFB5A7" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="chair-leg-back"><rect x="135" y="280" width="10" height="80" fill="#FFB5A7" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g></svg>

scenes.name: とけい
scenes.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 400 400"><rect width="400" height="400" fill="#FFFFFF"/><g id="clock-frame"><circle cx="200" cy="200" r="150" fill="#FFE5B4" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="clock-face"><circle cx="200" cy="200" r="130" fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="number-12"><text x="200" y="95" font-family="Arial" font-size="24" text-anchor="middle" fill="#333" font-weight="bold">12</text></g><g id="number-3"><text x="310" y="210" font-family="Arial" font-size="24" text-anchor="middle" fill="#333" font-weight="bold">3</text></g><g id="number-6"><text x="200" y="320" font-family="Arial" font-size="24" text-anchor="middle" fill="#333" font-weight="bold">6</text></g><g id="number-9"><text x="90" y="210" font-family="Arial" font-size="24" text-anchor="middle" fill="#333" font-weight="bold">9</text></g><g id="hour-hand"><line x1="200" y1="200" x2="200" y2="130" stroke="#333" stroke-width="8" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round"/></g><g id="minute-hand"><line x1="200" y1="200" x2="280" y2="200" stroke="#333" stroke-width="5" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round"/></g><g id="center-dot"><circle cx="200" cy="200" r="8" fill="#FFB5A7" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="top-ring"><rect x="190" y="30" width="20" height="25" fill="#D4A373" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="bell-left"><circle cx="110" cy="75" r="22" fill="#FFEB99" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="bell-right"><circle cx="290" cy="75" r="22" fill="#FFEB99" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g></svg>

scenes.name: でんきスタンド
scenes.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 400 400"><rect width="400" height="400" fill="#FFFFFF"/><g id="lamp-shade"><polygon points="130,60 270,60 300,170 100,170" fill="#FFE5B4" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="shade-top"><ellipse cx="200" cy="60" rx="70" ry="12" fill="#D4A373" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="shade-bottom"><ellipse cx="200" cy="170" rx="100" ry="15" fill="#FFEB99" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="bulb"><circle cx="200" cy="195" r="22" fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="light-ray-left"><line x1="160" y1="195" x2="130" y2="195" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="light-ray-right"><line x1="240" y1="195" x2="270" y2="195" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="light-ray-down"><line x1="200" y1="230" x2="200" y2="255" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="neck"><rect x="195" y="210" width="10" height="60" fill="#D4A373" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="pole"><rect x="196" y="270" width="8" height="80" fill="#D4A373" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="base"><ellipse cx="200" cy="355" rx="70" ry="15" fill="#90BFD9" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="switch"><circle cx="260" cy="310" r="10" fill="#FFB5A7" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g><g id="cord"><path d="M 200 355 Q 320 360 360 380" fill="none" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></g></svg>
